message:
docs(ruqu): Add crates.io badges and installation details

- Add crates.io version, docs.rs, and downloads badges
- Add cargo add command examples
- Add links to crates.io, docs.rs, and source

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,11 @@ # ruQu: Classical Nervous System for Quantum Machines +

+ + + +

+

@@ -10,7 +16,7 @@ - +

@@ -246,6 +252,18 @@ cargo run --bin ruqu_predictive_eval --release -- --distance 5 --error-rate 0.01

📦 Installation +### From crates.io + +```bash +# Add to your project +cargo add ruqu + +# With all features +cargo add ruqu --features full +``` + +### In Cargo.toml + ```toml [dependencies] ruqu = "0.1" @@ -254,6 +272,11 @@ ruqu = "0.1" ruqu = { version = "0.1", features = ["full"] } ``` +**Links:** +- **crates.io**: [crates.io/crates/ruqu](https://crates.io/crates/ruqu) +- **Documentation**: [docs.rs/ruqu](https://docs.rs/ruqu) +- **Source**: [github.com/ruvnet/ruvector/tree/main/crates/ruQu](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruvector/tree/main/crates/ruQu) + ### Feature Flags | Feature | What it enables | When to use |
